seo.title: RECPL Gallery
seo.description: Explore RECPL field inspections, laboratory work, engineering support, equipment visuals, and team activity highlights.

hero.title: Our Work in Action
hero.description: A visual look at RECPL’s inspection assignments, laboratory support, engineering work, equipment handling, and team activity across projects.

items.title: Field Inspection Readiness
items.alt: RECPL engineers reviewing an industrial inspection assignment on site
items.caption: On-site coordination for inspection, audit planning, and engineering review before formal testing begins.

items.title: Laboratory and Reporting Support
items.alt: RECPL technical team supporting laboratory review and project documentation
items.caption: Laboratory support, calibration coordination, and disciplined reporting for traceable technical decisions.

items.title: Structural Review and Design Input
items.alt: Engineering professionals discussing structural drawings and design development
items.caption: Design support covering structural drawings, stability review, and engineering coordination for industrial assets.

items.title: Inspection Equipment in Use
items.alt: Industrial inspection equipment and field instruments prepared for engineering work
items.caption: Field-ready instruments and testing equipment used for consultancy, inspection, and technical verification.

items.title: Engineering Team in Action
items.alt: RECPL engineers working together on a site engineering and inspection activity
items.caption: RECPL’s team combines site presence, engineering review, and inspection discipline across every assignment.

items.title: Consultancy and Inspection Coordination
items.alt: RECPL professionals coordinating consultancy and inspection services at an industrial site
items.caption: Integrated consultancy and inspection support for industrial compliance, safety review, and asset reliability.
